CustomField.description: Comma-separated list of 18-character record Ids. When set, this template only appears in the runner / signature sender / Flow when running on one of the listed records. Empty = template applies to all records of the configured Base Object. Any-of semantics — a template with three Ids appears when running on any of the three.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Comma-separated record Ids (18 chars each) this template applies to. Leave blank to apply to all records.
CustomField.label: Specific Record Ids
